deck:
* Push-Pull Converter - Generated by OpenMagnetics
* Vin=24V, Vout=12V, f=100kHz
* Lmag=103.968uH, N=1.82

* DC Input
Vin vin_dc 0 24

* PWM Control Signals (alternating, non-overlapping)
Vpwm1 pwm_ctrl1 0 PULSE(0 5 0 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.550000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm2 pwm_ctrl2 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 5.000000e-06 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.550000e-06 1.000000e-05)
.model SW1 SW VT=2.500000 VH=0.010000 RON=0.010000 ROFF=1.000000e+06

* Center-Tapped Primary (center tap = Vin, low-side switches)
Vct_sense vin_dc center_tap 0
Lpri_top pri_top center_tap 1.039680e-04
Vpri_top_sense pri_top sw1_node 0
S1 sw1_node 0 pwm_ctrl1 0 SW1
Lpri_bot center_tap pri_bot 1.039680e-04
Vpri_bot_sense pri_bot sw2_node 0
S2 sw2_node 0 pwm_ctrl2 0 SW1

* Across-winding differential voltage probes (passive sign, center tap = vin_dc)
Bvpri_top_diff vpri_top_diff 0 V=V(vin_dc)-V(pri_top)
Bvpri_bot_diff vpri_bot_diff 0 V=V(vin_dc)-V(pri_bot)

* Center-Tapped Secondary (center tap = GND)
Lsec_top sec_top 0 3.138751e-05
Lsec_bot 0 sec_bot 3.138751e-05

* Transformer Coupling (pairwise for ngspice compatibility)
K1 Lpri_top Lpri_bot 0.9999
K2 Lpri_top Lsec_top 0.9999
K3 Lpri_top Lsec_bot 0.9999
K4 Lpri_bot Lsec_top 0.9999
K5 Lpri_bot Lsec_bot 0.9999
K6 Lsec_top Lsec_bot 0.9999

* Convergence helpers
Rsnub_top pri_top 0 1000000.000000
Rsnub_bot pri_bot 0 1000000.000000
Rsnub_sec_top sec_top 0 1000000.000000
Rsnub_sec_bot sec_bot 0 1000000.000000

* Output Rectifiers and Filter
.model DIDEAL D(IS=1.000000e-14 RS=1.000000e-02 CJO=1e-12)
Vsec_top_sense sec_top sec_top_d 0
Dsec_top sec_top_d sec_rect DIDEAL
Vsec_bot_sense sec_bot sec_bot_d 0
Dsec_bot sec_bot_d sec_rect DIDEAL
Rsnub_d1 sec_top sec_snub1 100.000000
Csnub_d1 sec_snub1 sec_rect 1.000000e-09
Rsnub_d2 sec_bot sec_snub2 100
Csnub_d2 sec_snub2 sec_rect 1.000000e-09
Vsec_sense sec_rect sec_l_in 0
Lout sec_l_in vout 1.000000e-05
Cout vout 0 1.000000e-04 IC=12.000000
Rload vout 0 6.000000

* Transient Analysis
.tran 5.000000e-08 2.401000e-02 2.400000e-02 UIC

* Output signals
.save v(vpri_top_diff) v(vpri_bot_diff) i(Vpri_top_sense) i(Vpri_bot_sense) v(sec_top) v(sec_bot) i(Vsec_top_sense) i(Vsec_bot_sense) i(Vsec_sense) v(vout) v(vin_dc) i(Vin) i(Vct_sense)

.options RELTOL=0.003000 ABSTOL=1.000000e-07 VNTOL=1.000000e-04 ITL1=500 ITL4=200
.options METHOD=TRAP TRTOL=7.000000
.ic v(vout)=12.000000

.end
